layout.name: hasEyesChance
layout.title: Has Eyes Chance
layout.tooltip: The chance that any individual will have eyes (in percentage).

layout.name: canStareChance
layout.title: Can Stare at Player Chance
layout.tooltip: The chance that any individual can stare at the player (in percentage).

layout.name: stareMaxPlayerDistance
layout.title: Stare Maximum Player Distance
layout.tooltip: How close a player must be for the NPC to look at them. Set to 0 for no distance limit.

layout.name: horizontalGap
layout.title: Horizontal Gap
layout.tooltip: The horizontal distance between each individual's centre (in pixels).

layout.name: verticalGap
layout.title: Vertical Gap
layout.tooltip: The vertical distance between each individual's centre (in pixels).

layout.name: randomOffset
layout.title: Max Position Offset
layout.tooltip: The maximum distance that an individual's distance can be offset (in pixels). This does not affect the hitbox.
